description: UK startup providing affordable occupational health services to SMEs. Digital-first approach with quick assessments and practical guidance. Targeting underserved small business market.
business_model: B2B - Subscription and pay-per-use for SMEs
target_market: UK SMEs (10-500 employees) underserved by traditional OH providers

varden_fit.rationale: Direct competitor in SME segment - acquisition target for UK market entry
